name: Al Hurricane Jr.
description: '''Alberto Nelson Sanchez Jr.''' (October 30, 1959 – {{circa|May 19, 2026}}), known professionally as '''Al Hurricane Jr.''', was an American singer-songwriter. He is known as "El Godson" of [[New Mexico music]], a nickname which was inherited from his father [[Al Hurricane]], who is considered "The Godfather" of New Mexico music. He was his father's [[protégé]], having created numerous solo albums, and contributed songs such as "Flor de Las Flores" to New Mexico's unique style of Spanish music.
